channel.title: Vienna Public Transport — Disruptions & Commuter Info
channel.description: Active disruptions, construction works and restrictions from official sources (Wiener Linien, ÖBB, VOR/VAO, City of Vienna).

item.title: Wien Hauptbahnhof ↔ Wien Blumental ↔ Wien Meidling
item.description: Due to a police operation, no journeys were possible between Wien Meidling Station (U) and Wien Blumental Bahnhst to 20:49 watch. [Since 10.06.2026]
item.content:encoded:
Due to a police operation, no journeys were possible between Wien Meidling Station (U) and Wien Blumental Bahnhst to 20:49 watch.
[Since 10.06.2026]

item.title: S80: construction works
item.description: S80 Due to construction works partial failures of S80. Period: Phase 1X: From Saturday, 4. July 2026 to Sunday, 6. September 2026. Phase 2: From Monday, 7. September 2026 to … [From 04.07.2026]
item.content:encoded:
S80 Due to construction works partial failures of S80. Period: Phase 1X: From Saturday, 4. July 2026 to Sunday, 6. September 2026. Phase 2: From Monday, 7. September 2026 to …
[From 04.07.2026]

item.title: S1/S2/S3/S4/S7: S-Bahn-StammstreckeX (phase 2)
item.description: construction works Vienna StammstreckeX Phase 2 Period: From Monday, 7. September 2026 to October 2027. Measures: Due to construction worksX, the railway section between … [10.06.2026 – 31.10.2027]
item.content:encoded:
construction works Vienna StammstreckeX Phase 2 Period: From Monday, 7. September 2026 to October 2027. Measures: Due to construction worksX, the railway section between …
[10.06.2026 – 31.10.2027]

item.title: N20: Erzherzog-Karl-Straße
item.description: Channel breaking Due to urgent renovation work in the station area, the line N20 is run in both directions via the main carriageway and can be the station … [10.06.2026 – 17.06.2026]
item.content:encoded:
Channel breaking Due to urgent renovation work in the station area, the line N20 is run in both directions via the main carriageway and can be the station …
[10.06.2026 – 17.06.2026]

item.title: 53A: diversion
item.description: Because of roadworks in the Ratmannsdorfgasse, the diversion line has an diversion. [15.06.2026 – 19.06.2026]
item.content:encoded:
Because of roadworks in the Ratmannsdorfgasse, the diversion line has an diversion.
[15.06.2026 – 19.06.2026]

item.title: U2: Work on the interlocking on the 12.07.2026
item.description: Working on the interlocking The U2 earlier ends when working on the interlocking. [10.06.2026 – 13.07.2026]
item.content:encoded:
Working on the interlocking The U2 earlier ends when working on the interlocking.
[10.06.2026 – 13.07.2026]

item.title: 1/71/D: track construction works
item.description: Due to the extensive track construction works on the Ringstraße, the following transport measures are taken. [07.07.2026 – 22.08.2026]
item.content:encoded:
Due to the extensive track construction works on the Ringstraße, the following transport measures are taken.
[07.07.2026 – 22.08.2026]

item.title: U3: Switching
item.description: Exchange of switches The Westbahnhof and Johnstraße line is divided by the U3 line. [13.07.2026 – 31.08.2026]
item.content:encoded:
Exchange of switches The Westbahnhof and Johnstraße line is divided by the U3 line.
[13.07.2026 – 31.08.2026]

item.title: Badner Bahn: track construction works
item.description: Because of track construction works the Badner Bahn operating short-running will be. [04.07.2026 – 07.09.2026]
item.content:encoded:
Because of track construction works the Badner Bahn operating short-running will be.
[04.07.2026 – 07.09.2026]

item.title: 30/31: renovation work
item.description: Renovation work Due to the renovation of the Floridsdorfer Brücke, the following measures are taken on the 31 line. Period: From Monday, July 06, 2026 to expected End … [06.07.2026 – 17.08.2026]
item.content:encoded:
